article.title: Uber | SDE 2 | Backend | Bangalore
article.content:
**Current Company:** Big MNC
**YOE:** 5 years
**Fixed:** 53 LPA (including PF and Gratuity)
**Performance Bonus:** ~8 LPA
**Joining Bonus:** 0 LPA
**Stocks:** 70000 USD (vested over 4 years)
**Total compensation:** ~77 LPA

I have an offer from **Uber**.

**Fixed:** 54 LPA (including PF and Gratuity)
**Performance Bonus:** 7 LPA
**Joining Bonus:** 0 LPA
**Stocks:** 92000 USD (vested over 4 years)
**Total compensation:** ~82 LPA

I have a few questions.

1. Is the compensation looks fine based on my yoe? Specifically stocks as I feel fixed part is already a lot for SDE 2.
2. Is it wise enough to go for SDE 2 as from my research, Uber hires SSE (L5-A) only if one has more than 6 (preferably 7) yoe?
3. I have a few options in terms if teams I can join at Uber. I have heard that they are hiring for Freights, Train/Flights booking team, Autonomous Vehicle team, Chatbot team, etc. Which one should be best?

Could you please help?

post.content: Not worth the switch as you are not getting any compensation benefit and you have to start all over again.\nInstead wait for 1 or 2 years and try for Uber SSE. Then your pay would be much higher. \nAlso, if you join as SDE 2 now, getting promoted to SSE won\'t happen anytime soon

Why go for SDE2 at 5YOE? the compensation bump is not that high. I think you can do better, go for Sr. SDE and you will not be asking this question as thats the next jump you deserve. Getting promoted will take 2+ years, and the salary bump might not be that high, it's mostly a better offer if you join at that level. Sr. SDE comp at Uber is base around 80L, similar to Amazon, others.

About YOE for Sr., if not Uber, take Amazon or others, or maybe join Uber and go for Senior soon at other companies. But if you're already comfortable where you are, you can go straight for what's actually worth the move. 

I joined as SDE2 at 5 YOE, because my prev. comp was way lower than yours.
Hi, would you mind sharing your interview experience ?
Can you share your interview experience?
Uber Pays 54L base for SDE-II? It mostly around 45.
can you please share a road map for the same \n
Hi, would you mind sharing your interview experience ?\n\n
can you please share a road map for the same\n\n
may I know what is your current org name?
